query:
-- Delete evaluation results
DELETE FROM cpa_evaluation_results WHERE cpa_project_id = 120001;

-- Delete supervision team data
DELETE FROM cpa_consultant_supervision_team 
WHERE project_consultant_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM cpa_project_consultants WHERE cpa_project_id = 120001
);

-- Reset consultant data to blank state
UPDATE cpa_project_consultants SET
  design_fee_method = NULL,
  design_fee_amount = NULL,
  design_fee_percentage = NULL,
  supervision_fee_method = NULL,
  supervision_fee_amount = NULL,
  supervision_fee_percentage = NULL,
  supervision_stated_duration_months = NULL,
  supervision_submitted = 0,
  import_json = NULL,
  status = 'PENDING',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE cpa_project_id = 120001;
